properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When You move, hearts awaken Broken lives will be redeemed Here and now, as in Heaven Let revival be released

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hear our cry Heal our land Oh God, we pray for revival What You've done before You can do again Oh God, we pray for revival

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God of grace, God of salvation We are desperate on our knees You can save this generation Let revival be released

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: Like a river running through the barren land Let mercy flow, revive us again Move in power, save us by Your mighty hand Let mercy flow, revive us again :/ Revive us again

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hear our cry Heal our land Oh God, we pray for revival What You've done before You can do again Oh God, we pray for revival Oh God, we pray for revival Oh God, revive us again
